subjects.name: English
subjects.description: English involves the study of language, literature and literacy. AC9 English builds on the three interrelated strands of language, literature and literacy.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures

subjects.name: Mathematics
subjects.description: Mathematics is organised around the interaction of three strands: Number and Algebra, Measurement and Space, and Statistics and Probability.

subjects.name: Science
subjects.description: Science inquiry skills are developed through understanding and applying the scientific method to four strands: Biological, Chemical, Earth and Space, and Physical Sciences.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures

subjects.name: Humanities and Social Sciences
subjects.description: HASS encompasses History, Geography, Civics and Citizenship, and Economics and Business. In Years F-6, students explore personal and global contexts.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures
Asia and Australia's Engagement with Asia

subjects.name: Technologies
subjects.description: Students learn to create innovative solutions for identified needs and opportunities. Covers both Digital Technologies and Design and Technologies.

subjects.name: The Arts
subjects.description: The Arts includes Visual Arts, Music, Drama and Dance. Students develop artistic skills and aesthetic judgements through making and responding.
crossCurriculum: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures

subjects.name: Health and Physical Education
subjects.description: HPE develops the knowledge, understanding and skills students need to make healthy, safe and active choices. Includes personal development and movement.

subjects.name: Languages
subjects.description: Languages learning involves communicating in the target language, developing understanding of language as a system, and exploring the relationship between culture and language.
crossCurriculum: Asia and Australia's Engagement with Asia
